name: LEGAL CREDIT SOLUTIONS
description_short: Spanish-language credit repair company offering credit score improvement, dispute services, and bundled plans with micro-loans and identity protection.
description_long:
Legal Credit Solutions is a credit repair company operating primarily in Puerto Rico (based on the .com.pr domain and Spanish-language interface) that targets Spanish-speaking consumers seeking to improve their credit profiles. The company positions itself as a comprehensive credit improvement firm with the tagline "We heal your credit to transform your life."

The company offers multiple service tiers ranging from $89 to $169 monthly, with offerings that combine traditional credit repair services alongside supplementary products. Their core credit services include credit analysis, dispute filing with credit bureaus, removal of erroneous accounts, and specialized legal representation throughout the dispute process. Beyond credit repair, they bundle identity theft monitoring, credit score reporting, life and credit insurance coverage, and 24/7 customer support. They also offer micro-loan products (ranging from $600 to $1,850) as part of their membership plans.

Legal Credit Solutions distinguishes itself by packaging credit repair with micro-lending and insurance products in a bundled subscription model rather than charging per-dispute fees. They emphasize no contracts, no hidden costs, and offer a 15-day free trial for their premium tier. The company operates a multilingual, 24/7 support model and targets individuals seeking both credit improvement and immediate financial access through small loans.

A significant caveat is that the website makes broad transformation claims ("heal your credit," "transform your life") without specific examples, timelines, or substantiation of results. The bundling of credit repair with micro-loans and insurance raises questions about whether the primary focus is genuine credit improvement or loan origination. No information is provided about the company's compliance with credit repair organization laws, attorney involvement legitimacy, or regulatory licensing.
address: 200 S Biscayne Blvd Office 19-130, Miami, FL 33131

company_info.headquarters: 200 S Biscayne Blvd Office 19-130, Miami, FL 33131

pros: Bundled service model combines credit repair, monitoring, micro-loans, and insurance in single subscription
Multiple pricing tiers ($89–$169/month) allow consumers to choose based on budget and loan amount needs
Includes specialized attorney representation for credit disputes, which is less common in budget-tier credit repair
24/7 customer support and 24/7 credit score monitoring included in all plans
15-day free trial available for Credit Up Premium tier, reducing upfront commitment risk
No contracts and stated ability to cancel or change plans anytime
Serves Spanish-speaking market with fully Spanish-language interface and Puerto Rico-based operations
cons: Website contains repeated boilerplate marketing language with no specific case studies, timelines, or measurable outcomes
No transparency about dispute success rates, average credit score improvements, or how quickly results occur
Bundling of credit repair with micro-lending and insurance makes it unclear whether primary business is repair or lending
No information provided about company licensing, CRO compliance, or attorney credentials despite claiming specialized legal representation
Micro-loan interest rates, terms, and repayment schedules are not disclosed on the website
best_for: Spanish-speaking consumers in Puerto Rico or other Spanish-dominant markets seeking credit repair bundled with identity protection
Individuals needing both credit improvement and immediate access to small-dollar credit ($600–$1,850)
Budget-conscious consumers wanting attorney-backed dispute services without per-dispute fees
diagnosis: Legal Credit Solutions is best for Spanish-speaking consumers in Puerto Rico seeking a bundled credit repair and micro-loan product with 24/7 support. The main caveat is the lack of transparency about dispute success rates, credit score improvement timelines, and compliance with credit repair organization regulations—claims of transformation should be independently verified before enrollment.
services: Monthly credit analysis and credit score improvement consultation
Dispute filing and management with credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Erroneous account identification and removal requests
Specialized attorney representation during credit dispute process
Identity theft monitoring and protection services
Life insurance coverage (Cancer coverage up to $50K on higher tiers)
Micro-loans from $600 to $1,850 depending on plan tier
Roadside, home, and legal assistance (on higher tiers)
